title: G4Free Travel Compact Windproof Umbrella 54 Inch 10 Ribs UPF 50+ UV Protection Silver Coating Auto Open Close Sun Umbrella
features: UPF 50+ Sun Umbrella: Silver coating layer fabric reflects heat to cool you down; UPF 50+ high UV rated blocking 99.9% of the harmful UVA and UVB solar rays, protects your skin in the sun. Keep you cool in the sun and safe in the rain.

Large & Compact Travel Size: This compact UV umbrella is 54 inch in arc canopy, 46.5 inch in diameter, lightweight as 570g, can be collapsible to 13 inch, small size for easy storage in briefcases, backpacks, luggage, and more. The wrist loop is portable to take and it comes with an umbrella case to store.

Inverted Folding Design: This upside-down umbrella takes an inside-out design. When you close it, the wet part will be inside of the umbrella, preventing water from dripping, and it will not get you wet when getting in and out of the car. You don't even need to worry about this automatic travel umbrella will wet your floor and mat.

Strong Windproof Construction: The structure of G4Free windproof umbrellas is well designed and made. The frame is fortified with 10 ribs. Each of the ribs with spring is manufactured with premium fiberglass and high-quality stainless steel, which guarantee the stability of the whole structure.

Will Not Rust: We engineer our umbrellas to stand the test of time. For the ribs we use fibreglass, which is not rust, flexible and durable. Our high quality folding umbrellas for golf, sporting events, travel, and everyday.
